commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers can review the link-only docs direction and merge if they accept it.; Cleared: The final diff changes Markdown docs, docs navigation, and a public llms index only; it adds no dependencies, workflows, scripts, secrets handling, or package execution path. (sha=0a6886a5f6c0e726ea136f7e571678c9269d9ffd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a ClawHub plugin-development docs page, links it from docs navigation and discovery, and routes plugin validation guidance to canonical OpenClaw docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs navigation and linking PR, not a bug report. The observable behavior is the rendered docs page and canonical links, which the PR body/comment report exercising with docs build, docs smoke, static checks, link checks, and local render verification.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers can review the link-only docs direction and merge if they accept it.

target.title: docs: link to canonical OpenClaw plugin guides
target.body:
## Summary

- replace the mirrored OpenClaw plugin SDK and skill-authoring corpus with one concise ClawHub plugin-development entry point
- link directly to the canonical OpenClaw plugin system, building, SDK, manifest, testing, capability-specific, and skill-authoring guides
- link to `openclaw/plugin-inspector` as the current inspection implementation
- keep ClawHub-specific validation and publishing guidance local while routing SDK remediation references to OpenClaw
- document that ClawHub should link to OpenClaw authoring docs rather than mirror them

The final PR diff is six files: 103 additions and 37 deletions. The mirror pages, mirror-specific renderer changes, and extraction/sync ownership spec are no longer part of the PR.

## Verification

- `bun run docs:build` -> built 18 pages; indexed 17 pages / 2315 words
- `bun run docs:smoke` -> `ClawHub docs smoke ok`
- `bun run ci:static` -> passed
- `bun run format:check -- docs/README.md docs/clawhub.md docs/docs.json docs/plugin-development.md docs/plugin-validation-fixes.md` -> passed
- all linked OpenClaw documentation pages and `openclaw/plugin-inspector` returned HTTP 200
- rendered `http://127.0.0.1:4175/plugin-development` and verified navigation, canonical links, and ClawHub publishing handoff
- `git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main HEAD` -> clean
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
